positive: A stylized, high-contrast circular mandala pattern featuring a mythical forest spirit interacting with geometric flora. The main subject is a gentle, ethereal forest nymph with flowing, stylized hair and delicate features, surrounded by interwoven elements of glowing moss, stylized mushrooms, and abstract leaf shapes. The composition should utilize strong bilateral symmetry and a vibrant but controlled color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and gold accents. The overall aesthetic should be a seamless, intricate pattern suitable for large-scale apparel printing, resembling elegant woodcut engraving mixed with modern psychedelic geometry. Flat graphic elements should define the silhouette, ensuring clear lines and strong separation between colors. Highly detailed, perfect symmetry, central focus, sticker art style.
negative: blurry, low contrast, poor anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, text, signature, watermark, logos, writing, dirty, noise, jpeg artifacts, amateur, grayscale
